results.evidence: ./dist/mission request-approval <task_id> --action 'Deploy via CLI' exited with code 0, displayed '✓ Approval request created successfully' with approval ID, task ID, action, and pending status. API confirmed approval created with status='pending'.

./dist/mission check-approval <task_id> exited with code 0 in all three states: (1) pending: showed 'pending — awaiting review', (2) approved: showed 'approved' with Reviewed by/At fields, (3) denied: showed 'denied' with reviewedBy, reviewedAt, and reviewer notes displayed.
